name: antislop-cursor
description: AntiSlop persona system ported to Cursor (MVP): the always-on subagent-orchestrator loop - orchestrator + explorer + lead-programmer + reviewer - plus protected-paths / edit / stop / reviewer-route enforcement hooks and the shared persona-protocol rule. Agent-teams mode, per-agent tool/turn/MCP/memory scoping, and structured user prompts are dropped or degraded on Cursor - see docs/cursor-port-notes.md.
